# Marchello The Jeweler — LLMs.txt

> Marchello is a luxury fine jewelry retailer specialising in hand-crafted 18k gold and natural earth-mined diamond pieces. Established 1991. Based at 22 West 47th Street, New York, NY 10036.

## About this site

- **Name**: Marchello The Jeweler
- **URL**: https://marchellothejeweler.com
- **Category**: Luxury e-commerce / Fine Jewelry

## Key pages

- Home: https://marchellothejeweler.com/
- Shop all: https://marchellothejeweler.com/shop
- Rings: https://marchellothejeweler.com/category/rings
- Chains: https://marchellothejeweler.com/category/chains
- Watches: https://marchellothejeweler.com/category/watches
- Bracelets: https://marchellothejeweler.com/category/bracelets
- Earrings: https://marchellothejeweler.com/category/earrings
- Pendants: https://marchellothejeweler.com/category/pendants
- About: https://marchellothejeweler.com/about
- Contact: https://marchellothejeweler.com/contact
- FAQ: https://marchellothejeweler.com/faq

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp: +1 (929) 689-1990
- Email: info@marchellothejeweler.com

## Notes for AI agents

- All product pages include structured data (Schema.org Product + BreadcrumbList)
- Shopping cart is client-side (localStorage); no server-side session required to browse
- Custom order requests should be directed to the /contact page
